final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we, // write enable
    input wire re, // read enable
    input wire [3:0] addr, // 4-bit address for 16 locations
    input wire [15:0] data_in, // 16-bit data input
    output reg [15:0] data_out // 16-bit data output
);
    reg [15:0] unused_memory [0:15]; // 16 locations of 16-bit unused_memory

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            unused_memory[addr] <= data_in; // Write data to unused_memory at specified address
        end
        if (re) begin
            data_out <= unused_memory[addr]; // Read data from unused_memory at specified address
        end
    end
endmodule
